criteria.criterion: embed(text) returns float32 array with length > 0
embed('') returns [] or throws clear error
store.get on nonexistent key returns null/undefined without throw
GET /api/status includes devices array when device registered
GET /api/status devices=[] when no devices registered
POST /api/chat supports tool_use, response contains tool_use content block
POST /api/chat without tools returns normal text response
